v.CNV: 有福的人：不从恶人的计谋，不站罪人的道路，不坐好讥笑的人的座位。
v.ESV: Blessed is the man who walks not in the counsel of the wicked, nor stands in the way of sinners, nor sits in the seat of scoffers;
v.GAE: 복 있는 사람은 악인들의 꾀를 따르지 아니하며 죄인들의 길에 서지 아니하며 오만한 자들의 자리에 앉지 아니하고
v.KJV: Blessed is the man that walketh not in the counsel of the ungodly, nor standeth in the way of sinners, nor sitteth in the seat of the scornful.
v.NASB: How blessed is the man who does not walk in the counsel of the wicked, Nor stand in the path of sinners, Nor sit in the seat of scoffers!
v.NIV: Blessed is the one who does not walk in step with the wicked or stand in the way that sinners take or sit in the company of mockers,
v.NRSV: Happy are those who do not follow the advice of the wicked, or take the path that sinners tread, or sit in the seat of scoffers;
v.SAENEW: 복 있는 사람은 악인의 꾀를 따르지 아니하며, 죄인의 길에 서지 아니하며, 오만한 자의 자리에 앉지 아니하며,
v.WLB: 복이 있는 사람은 악한 사람들의 꾀를 따라가지 않고 죄인들의 길에 서지 않으며 남을 업신여기는 사람들과 자리를 함께하지 않고

v.CNV: 他喜爱的是耶和华的律法，他昼夜默诵的也是耶和华的律法。
v.ESV: but his delight is in the law of the Lord , and on his law he meditates day and night.
v.GAE: 오직 여호와의 율법을 즐거워하여 그의 율법을 주야로 묵상하는도다
v.KJV: But his delight is in the law of the LORD; and in his law doth he meditate day and night.
v.NASB: But his delight is in the law of the LORD, And in His law he meditates day and night.
v.NIV: but whose delight is in the law of the Lord , and who meditates on his law day and night.
v.NRSV: but their delight is in the law of the LORD, and on his law they meditate day and night.
v.SAENEW: 오로지 주님의 율법을 즐거워하며, 밤낮으로 율법을 묵상하는 사람이다.
v.WLB: 오직 여호와의 율법을 즐거워하고 그 율법을 밤낮으로 깊이 생각하는 자로다.

v.CNV: 他像一棵树，栽在溪水旁，按时结果子，叶子总不枯干；他所作的一切，尽都顺利。
v.ESV: He is like a tree planted by streams of water that yields its fruit in its season, and its leaf does not wither. In all that he does, he prospers.
v.GAE: 그는 시냇가에 심은 나무가 철을 따라 열매를 맺으며 그 잎사귀가 마르지 아니함 같으니 그가 하는 모든 일이 다 형통하리로다
v.KJV: And he shall be like a tree planted by the rivers of water, that bringeth forth his fruit in his season; his leaf also shall not wither; and whatsoever he doeth shall prosper.
v.NASB: He will be like a tree firmly planted by streams of water, Which yields its fruit in its season And its leaf does not wither; And in whatever he does, he prospers.
v.NIV: That person is like a tree planted by streams of water, which yields its fruit in season and whose leaf does not wither— whatever they do prospers.
v.NRSV: They are like trees planted by streams of water, which yield their fruit in its season, and their leaves do not wither. In all that they do, they prosper.
v.SAENEW: 그는 시냇가에 심은 나무가 철따라 열매를 맺으며 그 잎이 시들지 아니함 같으니, 하는 일마다 잘 될 것이다.
v.WLB: 그는 시냇가에 심은 나무가 계절에 따라 열매를 맺고 그 잎이 시들지 않는 것처럼 하는 일마다 모두 잘되리라.

v.CNV: 恶人却不是这样，他们好像糠秕，被风吹散。
v.ESV: The wicked are not so, but are like chaff that the wind drives away.
v.GAE: 악인들은 그렇지 아니함이여 오직 바람에 나는 겨와 같도다
v.KJV: The ungodly are not so: but are like the chaff which the wind driveth away.
v.NASB: The wicked are not so, But they are like chaff which the wind drives away.
v.NIV: Not so the wicked! They are like chaff that the wind blows away.
v.NRSV: The wicked are not so, but are like chaff that the wind drives away.
v.SAENEW: 그러나 악인은 그렇지 않으니, 한낱 바람에 흩날리는 쭉정이와 같다.
v.WLB: 악인은 그렇지 않으니 그저 바람에 날려가는 겨와 같도다.

v.CNV: 因此，在审判的时候，恶人必站立不住；在义人的团体中，罪人也必这样。
v.ESV: Therefore the wicked will not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous;
v.GAE: 그러므로 악인들은 심판을 견디지 못하며 죄인들이 의인들의 모임에 들지 못하리로다
v.KJV: Therefore the ungodly shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.
v.NASB: Therefore the wicked will not stand in the judgment, Nor sinners in the assembly of the righteous.
v.NIV: Therefore the wicked will not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the assembly of the righteous.
v.NRSV: Therefore the wicked will not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous;
v.SAENEW: 그러므로 악인은 심판받을 때에 몸을 가누지 못하며, 죄인은 의인의 모임에 참여하지 못한다.
v.WLB: 그러므로 악인들이 심판을 받을 때 죄인들은 의인의 모임에 참석하지 못하리라.

v.CNV: 因为耶和华看顾义人的道路，恶人的道路却必灭亡。
v.ESV: for the Lord knows the way of the righteous, but the way of the wicked will perish.
v.GAE: 무릇 의인들의 길은 여호와께서 인정하시나 악인들의 길은 망하리로다
v.KJV: For the LORD knoweth the way of the righteous: but the way of the ungodly shall perish.
v.NASB: For the LORD knows the way of the righteous, But the way of the wicked will perish.
v.NIV: For the Lord watches over the way of the righteous, but the way of the wicked leads to destruction.
v.NRSV: for the LORD watches over the way of the righteous, but the way of the wicked will perish.
v.SAENEW: 그렇다. 의인의 길은 주님께서 인정하시지만, 악인의 길은 망할 것이다.
v.WLB: 의인의 길은 여호와께서 보호하시나 악인의 길은 망하리라.
